intro: Written and produced by Saul Loubassa Bighonda, Music by Saul brings together reflective songs shaped by faith, conviction, transformation, identity, and the renewing of the mind.
aiDisclosure: Saul writes the lyrics and directs the creative vision behind each release, using AI-assisted voices, vocals, and musical generation as part of the production process.
